subcodes.first_line: The loved ones of God have ever been beneath the glance of divine grace - each and every servant, both men and women, who turn unto the Most Exalted Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لازال اولیای الهی تحت لحاظ فضل بوده اند هر یک از عباد و اماء که بافق اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @call to action
